race.description: $9 Swan Draught Fridays In Steelo's Discretionary Hcp Ss Pace
race.comment: STORMY VISTA NZ (8) drew on the back row and had to work when racing three wide without cover so did well to fight on and finish 4.5 metres away in third when resuming here last week. Switches to standing start but should strip fitter. LUVBITE (10) galloped out from the standing start last time but recovered to win at this circuit and distance. Goes back 30m in the handicap so he'll need to get it right but he is capable. ARTFUL MAJOR (9) is another starting from the 30m mark but he is hard to knock having won his two starts from behind a mobile so far this campaign. Worth sticking with him. CHIVALRY NZ (13) has to overcome a 50m handicap and faded after working last start but did a good job to win from a back row draw here prior.
